upstream_note: v2: full 6x6. Top-level cells are the openai-egress row for v1 compatibility; the full grid is under upstreams.<egress>.cells keyed by ingress dialect.
capability_note: advisory context only (probe-first: every cell is probed regardless): One-API v0.6.10 has no OpenAI-Responses relay mode and its Cohere channel emits the Cohere v1 /v1/chat shape, not the v2 dialect this suite probes (relay/channeltype/define.go, relay/adaptor/cohere/adaptor.go GetRequestURL); those cells are grey by that capability limit

openai.verdict_note: untestable: no upstream base-URL override reaches the test mock (a mock-reachability limit of this rig, not gateway incapability). One-API v0.6.10's AWS/Bedrock channel constructs the aws-sdk bedrockruntime client with no endpoint override and skips the base_url relay path (relay/adaptor/aws/adaptor.go), so the harness mock cannot stand in for the upstream; One-API does relay Bedrock in production

hardware: AWS m7g.4xlarge (Graviton3, 16 cores / 64 GB). Gateway-under-test pinned to 4 cores (the comparable basis); mock and load generator on 6 cores each so the mock never bottlenecks the streaming sweep. Ubuntu 24.04. One dedicated box per gateway.
